message:
refactor(abi): migrate 48 libc::syscall calls to raw syscalls in glibc_internal_abi.rs

Part of bd-h5x EPIC: remove glibc callthrough.

Migrated syscalls include:
- __sched_* functions (get_priority_max/min, getparam, getscheduler, setscheduler, yield)
- Basic I/O: __close, __read, __write, __open, __open64, __lseek, __pread64, __pwrite64
- Process: __fork, __getpid, __wait, __waitpid
- Sockets: __connect, __socket, __send, __select, __recv
- Memory: __mmap, __mprotect, __munmap, __madvise
- Time: __nanosleep, __clock_gettime, stime, ftime
- Files: __pipe, __poll, __dup2, __fcntl
- Misc: gettid, llseek, isfdtype, getdirentries/64, preadv64v2, pwritev64v2
- Nocancel variants: __close_nocancel, __open_nocancel, __read_nocancel, etc.
- Internal aliases: __fstat64, __sigtimedwait

Progress: 92 → 44 libc::syscall calls in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
